briefing.one_line_description: AI-powered revenue intelligence platform that analyzes sales conversations to help revenue teams close deals

recent_signals.description: Appointed Joe FitzGerald as Chief Legal Officer to oversee global legal affairs and regulatory compliance
Launched Mission Andromeda initiative with AI sales coaching chatbot and MCP integrations as AI-native revenue platform
Named to Fast Company's World's Most Innovative Companies 2026 list, ranked #7 in Applied AI category
Named Leader in Gartner Magic Quadrant for Revenue Action Orchestration, ranked #1 across four use cases
Launched Gong Orchestrate and new AI capabilities to double rep productivity and accelerate execution 5x

data_gaps: Current CEO/executive leadership team names and titles
Exact current employee count (sources show 1200+ in 2021, 1500 by end of 2025)
Current ARR or revenue figures (last reported $135M ARR in 2021)
Details on $4.5B secondary transaction mentioned in early 2026
VP and Director level contacts across key departments
Specific tech stack integrations beyond those mentioned

dossier.disqualifier_reason: Direct competitor - Gong is a conversation intelligence and revenue intelligence platform, explicitly named in the peer set as a direct competitor to the product being sold
dossier.tier_reasoning: Gong is a direct competitor explicitly listed in the ICP peer set. They are a conversation intelligence and revenue intelligence platform - their core product directly competes with the AI-powered Sales/RevOps platform being sold. Despite strong signals (1,500 employees, Series F, recent product launches with Mission Andromeda and Gong Orchestrate), they meet the hard disqualifier rule.
icp_matches: B2B SaaS company with clear subscription revenue model
Series F funding stage - mature scaling company
Strong GTM maturity with visible sales motion and revenue intelligence focus
Recent product launches (Mission Andromeda, Gong Orchestrate) indicate active innovation
icp_gaps: Direct competitor to the product being sold
Would never be a buyer for a competing sales/revenue intelligence platform
